text: Berada jauh dr jalan raya , perlu jalan kaki naik turun bebatuan. Sekitar 1 jam jalan kaki baru sampai.j gn lupa bawa persediaan air dan makanan untuk di jalan . Kondisi air pada saat kami berkunjung airnya keruh. Menikmati bebatuan pahatan dari Alam yang sangat mengagumkan.
english_translation: Located far from the highway, it requires walking up and down rocky terrain. It takes about 1 hour of walking to arrive. Don't forget to bring water and food supplies for the journey. The water condition during our visit was murky. Enjoy the amazing natural rock carvings.
summary: Access to this remote site requires a challenging one-hour hike over rocky terrain. With no facilities available, visitors must bring their own food and water. The primary activity is viewing natural rock carvings, although a water feature at the location was observed to be murky.

text:
Tempat parkir luas, motor, helm dan mobil diparkir AMAN.
Lebih baik datang pukul 5 atau 6 sore karena lebih mudah memilih spot camping yang bagus buat foto-foto.
Malam view city light nya keren dan pagi view nya ga kalah keren.
english_translation:
Spacious parking lot, motorcycles, helmets, and cars are parked SAFELY.
It's better to come around 5 or 6 PM because it's easier to pick a good camping spot for photos.
The city light view at night is cool, and the view in the morning is no less cool.
summary: The attraction provides ample and secure parking for vehicles and is an ideal location for camping and photography. It offers impressive city light views at night and scenic morning vistas, with a late afternoon arrival recommended for securing the best camping spots.

text: sukaa banget disini.. tempatnya tenang bgt, walau awalnya jalan menuju kesini ada yg rusak parah skitar 1km (yg bannya ceper lbh baik pikir 2x) tapi pas masuk worth it bgt.. dingin, pemandangan bagus dan pulangnya menuju parkiran bisa naik free shutle car jadi ga berasa capek..
english_translation: Love it here so much. The place is very peaceful. Even though initially the road leading here was badly damaged for about 1km (those with flat tires should think twice), once you arrive, it's totally worth it. It's cool, the view is good, and on the way back to the parking lot, you can take a free shuttle car, so you don't feel tired.
summary: Access to the attraction is challenging due to a 1km stretch of poorly maintained road. However, the site offers a peaceful atmosphere with good views, and a complimentary shuttle service is provided to assist visitors with the return trip to the parking area.

text: Nuansanya sejuk. Ke tempat curug nya juga gak jauh, airnya juga bersih. Tempatnya luas, bisa buat kemping juga. Dan ada permainan flying fox nya juga buat anak anak. Tiket masuknya murah dan terjangkau. Pokoknya cocok buat obat penghilang penat😍 …
english_translation: The nuances are cool. It's not far to the waterfall, and the water is also clean. The place is spacious, suitable for camping too. And there's a flying fox game for the kids. The entrance ticket is cheap and affordable. Overall, it's perfect for relieving fatigue 😍
summary: This affordable and easily accessible attraction features a short walk to a clean waterfall. The spacious site is suitable for camping and offers activities, including a flying fox for children.

text: Tempatnya bagus.... Pemandangan indah.. Banyak spot foto... Hanya sayang tiketnya menurut saya terlalu tinggi Rp. 50.000/orang itu pun di dalamnya setiap wahana atau spot foto harus bayar lagi. Menyenangkan bagi yang punya cukup banyak uang...😊 …
english_translation: The place is nice.... Beautiful scenery.. Lots of photo spots... It's just a shame the ticket price, in my opinion, is too high at Rp. 50,000/person, and even then, every ride or photo spot inside requires an additional payment. It's fun for those who have quite a lot of money... 😊 …
summary: While the scenic attraction offers numerous photo spots and rides, visitors should be aware that the high entrance fee does not cover these activities, which all require separate additional payments.

text: Susah air buat wudhu dan anak2 setelah kotor-kotoran, bingung mau mandinya.. ga ada airnya, padahal air terjun deket
english_translation: It's difficult to get water for ablution and the children after they've gotten dirty, I'm confused about how to bathe them.. there's no water, even though there's a waterfall nearby.
summary: The location lacks essential water facilities for personal hygiene and religious ablution, which negatively impacts the experience for visitors, particularly families with children. This scarcity of water is especially notable given the site's proximity to a waterfall.

text: Poto Poto yang gentayangan di Instagram menghoda banget pengen ke sini. Pas ke sini pas pandemi..jadi leluasa. Fresh air oksigen sejuk...Playground nya juga seru. Mushola toilet nya juara 🏆 ni...klo udah ke lewat satu..ntar di depan ada. Ga pake riweuh balik lagi.gitu. Cocok buat family, keluarga atau geng... …
english_translation: The photos circulating on Instagram are very tempting, making me want to visit. I came here during the pandemic, so it was uncrowded. Fresh, cool oxygen air... The playground is also fun. The prayer room and toilets are winners 🏆... if you pass one, there's another one up ahead. No hassle going back. It's suitable for families, relatives, or groups...
summary: This family-friendly attraction features a fun playground and is well-equipped with numerous, conveniently accessible prayer rooms and toilets located throughout the site, making it easy for groups to navigate.

text:
Curug pelangi yg bener-bener ada pelanginya. Cantik banget 🥺🥺 tiketnya 20k parkir 5k
Dibawah ada toilet, mushola dan warung
Turun tangga gak kerasa. Perjalanan pulang alias naik tangganya itu mantab banget. Bikin kaki Tremor parah wkwkw
english_translation:
A rainbow waterfall that *actually* has a rainbow. So beautiful 🥺🥺 Ticket is 20k, parking is 5k
Below there are toilets, a prayer room, and a small shop.
Going down the stairs doesn't feel like anything. The trip back, meaning climbing the stairs, is amazing. Makes your legs shake badly lol
summary: The attraction is a scenic waterfall accessed via a physically demanding staircase. The site provides toilets, a prayer room, and a shop, with separate fees for entry and parking.

text: Tempat ini sebenarnya sangat indah dan alami. Tapi infrastrukturnya perlu diperbaiki. Jalan menuju ke sini cukup buruk, terutama jika Anda mengendarai sepeda motor. Juga, ada monyet di dalam tempat ini dan mereka cukup agresif, jadi berhati-hatilah dan jaga anak Anda jika Anda memilikinya.
english_translation: This place is actually very beautiful and natural. But the infrastructure needs to be improved. The road to get here is quite bad, especially if you are riding a motorcycle. Also, there are monkeys in this place and they are quite aggressive, so be careful and watch your children if you have them.
summary: The attraction is difficult to access due to poor road conditions, particularly for motorcyclists, and its on-site infrastructure is underdeveloped. Visitors must also be cautious of aggressive monkeys, which pose a safety risk, especially to children.

text:
Bunga2 nya banyak variasi dan terawat.. walaupun gak terlalu besar lokasinya tapi banyak spot foto yg bagus.. harga masuknya juga gak mahal..

Kalao lagi hujan bisa neduh sambil makan di restonya..

Yg agak kurang terawat dibagian kebun sayuran.. kalo mau petik2 sendiri tidak banyak variannya..
english_translation:
The flowers are varied and well-maintained. Although the location isn't very large, there are many good photo spots. The entrance fee is also not expensive.

If it's raining, you can take shelter and eat at the restaurant.

The vegetable garden area is a bit less maintained. If you want to pick things yourself, there aren't many varieties.
summary: This compact and affordable attraction offers well-maintained flower gardens ideal for photography and includes an on-site restaurant for shelter or dining. However, its vegetable garden is less cared for and provides limited options for self-picking.

text:
Pertama kali kesini.. jalannya luar biasa 🤣bisa bikin langsing.. pas sampe bawah beuh luar biasa 😍 tiket masuk 20 ribu per orang plus parkir 3000 ribu
Pas kesana ga ada monyet yang ganggu.. …
english_translation:
First time here.. the road was amazing 🤣 it could make you lose weight.. when I got to the bottom, wow, amazing 😍 entrance ticket is 20 thousand per person plus parking 3000 thousand
When I went there, there were no monkeys bothering...
summary: Access to this scenic attraction requires a physically challenging journey. The site charges separate fees for entrance and parking, and the visitor noted a pleasant experience without any disturbance from local monkeys.

text: tiket masuk 15k, terdapat banyak curug yang dapat dikunjungi, pada saat musim hujan airnya agak keruh
english_translation: Entrance fee 15k, there are many waterfalls to visit, during the rainy season the water is a bit murky
summary: For a 15k admission fee, visitors can explore numerous waterfalls, although the water tends to be murky during the rainy season.

text: Adem, tiketnya masih terjangkau, bunga bunga nya bagus, sayang sekali pas beli nasi goreng dan mie tektek difoodcourt "DAPUR IBU", rasa makanannya kurang enak.. harganya range 30-40rb sudah pajak.. ga worth..
english_translation: The ticket price is still affordable, the flowers are nice. It's a shame that when I bought fried rice and mie tektek at the food court "DAPUR IBU," the food didn't taste good. The price was around 30-40rb including tax... not worth it.
summary: The attraction offers affordable admission and pleasant floral scenery, but its on-site food court is noted for serving poor-quality, overpriced meals.

text: Tmptnya ok ... Pa LG bwt yg LG .... Kesemsem.....
english_translation: The place is okay... What else for the one that is... Smitten.....
summary: The review offers a vague, subjective opinion of the attraction but provides no specific details regarding its accessibility, facilities, or activities.

text: Pemandangannya indah banget... Banyak spot spot foto kayak berasa keliling dunia...mba mba dan mas masnya ramah dn dengan senang hati mau motoin kita.. keren lah..sayang belum semua jadi bngunannya..mungkin nanti.bakal lebih meriah dan bnyak lagi spot fotonya
english_translation: The view is really beautiful... Lots of photo spots, it feels like traveling around the world... The ladies and gentlemen there are friendly and happy to take photos for us... it's cool... It's a shame not all the buildings are finished yet... maybe later it will be more festive and have even more photo spots.
summary: This tourist site offers excellent photo opportunities with diverse, scenic backdrops and friendly staff available to help take pictures. A key consideration is that the location is not yet fully completed, with some construction still in progress.

text: Datanglah pagi2 segar, adem, dan masih sepi. Mushollanya bagus, bagus dan unik. Desain mushollanya suka deh. Untuk duduk2 maupun main nyaman dan seru. Ada juga panggung untuk acara ttt. Panggung yg kl dpake serasa lg manggung ditengah hutan yg rapi. Tpt kelincinya juga bersih ada keran u tpt cuci tangan.
english_translation: Come early morning, it's fresh, cool, and still quiet. The prayer room is nice, good, and unique. I really like the prayer room's design. It's comfortable and fun for sitting around or playing. There's also a stage for events. When used, the stage feels like you're performing in the middle of a neat forest. The rabbit enclosure is also clean, with a faucet for handwashing.
summary: This attraction features a uniquely designed and comfortable prayer room, an event stage with a natural forest ambiance, and a clean rabbit enclosure with handwashing facilities, making it suitable for relaxation, play, and performances.

text: Telah bermalam di sini pada tahun 1995, tahun lalu. 2001 dengan ozog gubrag, pupuk olegun!! Hahaha... sayang bukan era digital... dokumentasi selebihnya dari tahun 1998!! Dahulu masih banyak monyet... di pagi hari" berkerumun di sisi tenda! Bangun dari tidur dengan tenda terbuka ke mata monyet...!!! Hahaha
english_translation: Stayed here in 1995, last year. 2001 with ozog gubrag, olegun fertilizer!! Hahaha... too bad it wasn't the digital era... the rest of the documentation is from 1998!! There used to be a lot of monkeys... in the morning, crowding the side of the tent! Waking up from sleep with the tent open to monkey eyes...!!! Hahaha
summary: Based on a past visit, the site provided camping facilities and was characterized by an abundance of monkeys that would approach the tents in the morning.

text: Bagus untuk destinasi keluarga di hari libur tanpa harus menanjak najak lagi karena mobil sudah bisa masuk ke tempat destinasinya pemandangannya juga cantiikkk kaya pengunjungnyaaaa
english_translation: Great for a family holiday destination without having to climb anymore because cars can already enter the destination. The scenery is also beautiful, just like the visitors!
summary: This family-friendly destination offers beautiful scenery and is easily accessible by vehicle, eliminating any need for climbing.

text:
Destinasi wisata yang cocok bersama keluarga tempat yang menjadi pilihan di Kab. Bandung Barat.
Noted;
Saran bagi pengelola Managemen GC kiranya kebersihan Toilet/WC harus lebih diutamakan agar menjadi perhatian.
Dijaga dan dirawat supaya meninggalkan kesan baik
english_translation:
Suitable tourist destinations with family in West Bandung Regency.
Noted:
Advice for the GC Management, toilet cleanliness should be prioritized to be given attention.
Maintain and care for it so that it leaves a good impression.
summary: This family-friendly tourist destination in West Bandung Regency is noted to have toilet facilities that require significant improvement in cleanliness and maintenance.

text: Curug yang Eksotis, se Eksotis nanjak nya. Cocok juga untuk yang suka Hiking dikarenakan jalan nanjak se nanjak gunung Everest.
english_translation: Exotic Waterfall, as exotic as the climb. Also suitable for those who like hiking because the uphill path is as steep as Mount Everest.
summary: The Exotic Waterfall is reached via a strenuous and steep uphill hike, making it a suitable attraction for visitors seeking a challenging trekking experience.

text: Tempatnya bagus sayang gk ngajak anak sama istri, pemandangannya bagus hamparan hijau dimana mana ada bukit hijau juga, di tambah udara nya yang sejuk, ada kolam berenangnya juga, ada danau juga dan bisa naik bebek2 an. Semoga bisa ajak anak dan istri saya kembali lagi kesama
english_translation: The place is nice, darling, too bad you didn't bring the kids and wife. The view is good, a vast expanse of green everywhere, with green hills too. Added to that is the cool air, there's also a swimming pool and a lake where you can ride pedal boats. Hopefully, I can bring my children and wife back again.
summary: This scenic, family-friendly destination offers key facilities such as a swimming pool and a lake where visitors can enjoy pedal boat rides.

text: Kalo pagi2 sekitar jam 6an kesana, kita berasa di atas awan trus bisa liat sunrise.
english_translation: If you go there in the morning around 6 o'clock, you'll feel like you're above the clouds and can see the sunrise.
summary: The site's main activity is sunrise viewing, which is accessible around 6 AM and offers a unique perspective from what feels like above the clouds.

text: Benar-benar masih asri, banyak pohon, jalan serapaknya juga sangat rapi menurut saya, banyak monyet dan juga suara serangga, sayang ya curug dan  sungainya penuh sampah dan air berwarna keruh kecoklatan, sangat disayangkan bisa rusak seperti itu.. ayo mulai jgn buang sampah ke sungai guys 🙏🙏🙏 …
english_translation: Truly still pristine, lots of trees, the walking paths are also very neat in my opinion, lots of monkeys and also insect sounds. It's a shame that the waterfall and the river are full of trash and the water is murky brownish, it's a great pity it could be damaged like that. Let's start, don't throw trash into the river guys 🙏🙏🙏...
summary: This natural attraction features well-maintained walking paths suitable for enjoying its pristine environment, which includes abundant trees and wildlife like monkeys. However, the site's waterfall and river are heavily polluted with trash and murky water, diminishing the overall experience.

text: Artistik tempatnya, bagus buat hunting foto2 cantik... tapi blum terlalu banyak pilihan makanan nya dan fasilitas yg ditawarkan masi kurang menarik
english_translation: Artistic place, good for taking beautiful photos... but not too many food options yet and the facilities offered are still less appealing.
summary: This artistic attraction is excellent for photography, though its facilities and dining options are currently limited and underdeveloped.

text: Pemandangan indah, terletak tidak begitu jauh dari Alun-Alun Lembang, jalur yang terang, layanan yang cukup bagus dari penjaga setempat. Biaya masuk Rp 52k untuk dua orang & dua sepeda motor. Tapi tidak ada air yang mengalir meskipun ada beberapa toilet umum, tetapi tangki airnya kosong
english_translation: Beautiful view, located not too far from Lembang Square, the path is clear, pretty good service from the local guards. Entrance fee Rp 52k for two people & two motorcycles. But there is no running water even though there are some public toilets, but the water tanks are empty
summary: This conveniently located attraction features clear pathways and helpful staff, though an entrance fee is required. While public toilets are available, they are non-functional due to a lack of running water.

text: Akses menuju curug ini masih sangat susah, belum ada tangga yang aman bagi anak-anak. Sangat tidak disarankan ke Curug ini saat hujan. Namun yang terbaik dari curug ini adalah banyaknya batu-batu kecil di sekitar aliran curug yang berguna bagi anda yang ingin merasakan kesejukan air curug tanpa harus berbasah-basah.
english_translation: Access to this waterfall is still very difficult, there are no safe stairs for children. It is highly not recommended to visit this waterfall during rain. However, the best thing about this waterfall is the abundance of small rocks around the waterfall's flow, which are useful for those who want to feel the coolness of the waterfall's water without getting wet.
summary: The waterfall has poor and unsafe access, lacking safe stairs and being particularly hazardous during rain. A key feature is the surrounding rocks, which provide an opportunity for visitors to enjoy the coolness of the water without getting wet.

text: Adem bngt udaranya nyaman bersih pas buat yg bln madu
english_translation: The air is really nice and comfortable, perfect for honeymoons.
summary: The attraction provides a pleasant atmosphere, making it suitable for romantic activities like honeymoons, but no information regarding accessibility or other facilities is mentioned.

text: Temoatnya bagus, view nya menarik, dikasih free minum, dan bisa naik sepedah disana, spot foto yang menarik, hanya saja tempat belum tertata rapih sepenuhnya tetapi overall great place disana.. Recomended buat tempat bermain bersama keluarga
english_translation: The atmosphere is good, the view is attractive, they give free drinks, and you can ride a bicycle there. It's an interesting photo spot. It's just that the place isn't fully organized yet, but overall it's a great place to be. Recommended for a place to play with family.
summary: This family-friendly attraction offers activities like bicycling and photography, along with complimentary drinks, although it is not yet fully organized.

text: Tempatnya bagus dan cukup luas cuma beberapa tempat dibatasi dan harus bayar kembali. Harga tiket masuk Rp. 20000,-. Variasi makanan cukup banyak dan terjangkau untuk harga sekelas tempat wisata namun membeli harus menggunakan koin yang bisa ditukarkan disana. Membeli koin secukupnya saja karena tidak dapat diuangkan kembali
english_translation: The place is nice and quite spacious, but some areas are restricted and require an additional payment. The entrance fee is Rp. 20,000. There's a good variety of food and it's reasonably priced for a tourist spot, but you have to buy it using coins that can be exchanged there. Only buy enough coins as needed because they are non-refundable.
summary: This attraction charges a Rp. 20,000 entrance fee, with certain spacious areas requiring an additional payment for access. It offers a variety of reasonably priced food, which must be purchased using a special, non-refundable coin system available on-site.

text: Taman Bunga Begonia ini sebetulnya memiliki kawasan yang tidak begitu luas namun ditata agar dapat dinikmati pemandangannya sebagai tempat untuk selfie bersama pasangan, teman dan keluarga. disarankan tidak datang pada weekend karena arus lalu lintas menuju lembang selalu padat pada saat weekend atau liburan.
english_translation: This Begonia Flower Garden is not very large, but it is arranged to be enjoyed for its scenery, making it a good spot for selfies with your partner, friends, and family. It is advised not to visit on weekends because traffic towards Lembang is always heavy on weekends or holidays.
summary: This small, scenic garden is well-suited for photography, though its accessibility is significantly impacted by heavy weekend and holiday traffic in the Lembang area.

text: Suasananya sangat sejuk dan cocok untuk berbagai kalangan. Bagi yang memakai kursi roda atau stroller juga sangat aman karena jalannya dibuat halus namun harus diperhatikan ketika jalanan naik ataupun turun. Tempatnya sangat luas untuk dijelajahi. Jangan lupa bawa air minum agar tidak dehidrasi.
english_translation: The atmosphere is very pleasant and suitable for all ages. It is very safe for wheelchair users or those with strollers because the paths are made smooth, but caution is advised on uphill or downhill sections. The place is very spacious to explore. Don't forget to bring water so you don't get dehydrated.
summary: This spacious attraction offers smooth, accessible paths suitable for exploration by wheelchair and stroller users, though caution is recommended on sloped areas. Visitors are advised to bring their own water for hydration.

text: Asyik banget kalau yang mau cari tempat lega buat ngadem di kala pandemi kaya gini.. tempatnya lega.. bisa ngadem di danau atau ditamannya.. maenan sedikit tp no problem.. anak2 bisa lari2 bebas aja udh happy..
english_translation: It's so fun if you're looking for a spacious place to cool off during a pandemic like this. The place is spacious; you can chill by the lake or in the garden. Not many toys, but no problem; kids are happy just being able to run around freely.
summary: This spacious attraction features a lake and a garden, offering ample room for relaxation. While it has limited play equipment, its open areas are suitable for children to run and play freely.

text: akses gampang dan bagus.ga ngebosenin.tracking utk pmula.scenenya ok banget lah
english_translation: Easy and good access. Not boring. Tracking for beginners. The scenery is really great.
summary: This easily accessible attraction offers engaging, beginner-friendly trekking trails complemented by excellent scenery.

text:
Pembelian tiket langsung di jalanan saat mau parkir, jadi tidak ada loket khusus. Kondisi ramai Krn tanggal merah, makanan enak, uang dtukar koin untuk transaksi, unik juga.
Banyak makanan tradisional yang disajikan. Banyak wahana2 permainan. Cocok untuk keluarga.
english_translation:
Tickets are bought directly on the street when you want to park, so there are no special ticket booths. It was crowded because it was a public holiday. The food was delicious, and money is exchanged for coins for transactions, which is also unique.
Many traditional foods are served. There are many amusement rides. Suitable for families.
summary: This family-friendly attraction offers amusement rides and a variety of traditional foods. Access is managed through on-street ticket sales for parking, as there are no dedicated booths. The site uses a unique coin-based system for transactions and can become very crowded, especially on public holidays.

text: Lokasi cukup luas, banyak spot foto. Tiket masuk 20 rb gratis minuman. kemaren dari pagi sampai siang jam 11 an blm selesai keliling ke semua lokasi floating lembang ini. Next pasti ke bandung lagi.
english_translation: The location is quite spacious, with many photo spots. The entrance ticket is 20,000 Indonesian Rupiah which includes a free drink. Yesterday, we were there from morning until around 11 AM and still hadn't finished exploring all the locations at Floating Lembang. Next time, we will definitely come to Bandung again.
summary: This spacious attraction offers numerous photo opportunities and is extensive enough to require several hours to explore fully. The 20,000 Indonesian Rupiah entrance fee includes a complimentary drink.

text: Puncaknya lembang, jalanan naik turun cuaca sejuk dingin tp saat ksna kawah sdng aktif jd disarankan memakai masker krn bau blerang menyengat. But semua aman, wisata alam betapa indahnya ciptaan-Mu. Bisa foto dari atas dgn jalur yg sudah disediakan dan ada spot foto lainnya. Cocok bgt buat merefresh sejenak
english_translation: The peak of the plateau, roads go up and down, the weather is cool and cold, but when you get there, the crater is active so it's recommended to wear a mask because the sulfur smell is pungent. But everything is safe, nature tourism, how beautiful is Your creation. You can take photos from above with the provided path and there are other photo spots. Very suitable for a refreshing break.
summary: This nature attraction, located on a plateau peak accessible via hilly roads, features an active sulfur crater with a strong odor, making a mask advisable for visitors. The site is considered safe and provides a designated path and various photo spots for sightseeing and photography.

text: Pengalaman bagi yang akan berkunjung agar berhati hati nanti ada pemaksaan parkir mobil tdk resmi oleh masyarakat dengan alasan parkir penuh padahal tempat parkir lokasi masih luas,  jadi mohon pengelola agar diperhatikan spy pengunjung nyaman
english_translation: An experience for those who will visit, be careful, there will be unofficial forced car parking by the community under the pretext of full parking, even though the parking lot is still spacious. Therefore, the management is requested to pay attention so that visitors are comfortable.
summary: The review highlights an accessibility issue, warning visitors about unofficial parking attendants who may falsely claim the spacious official lot is full to direct them elsewhere.

text:
Suka dengan tempat ini
Bersih dan rapi
Asyik bersama keluarga
english_translation:
Love this place
Clean and tidy
Fun with family
summary: This clean and well-maintained attraction offers an enjoyable experience suitable for families.

text: Sebelum viral tempat ini sangat bagus, tapi setelah banyak yang datang dan kurang peduli pada lingkungan jadi kurang bagus.
english_translation: Before it went viral, this place was great, but after many people came and cared less about the environment, it became less good.
summary: This review indicates the attraction has experienced a significant increase in visitor traffic, leading to environmental degradation and a decline in its overall quality. The text provides no specific details regarding the site's facilities or available activities.

text:
Tempatnya rekomen bgt buat acara keluarga mau camp ataupun hy skdr botram
Cm jalannya saja dr dusun bambu ke gerbang tiket curug layungnya yaa bs dibilang kurang bagus
Untuk tiketnya masih terbilang murah lah..
Fasilitas lengkap..
Toilet mushola dan warkop ada
Lahan parkir luas...
english_translation:
The place is highly recommended for family events, whether camping or just a picnic.
Only the road from Dusun Bambu to the Curug Layung ticket gate is, you could say, not very good.
The ticket price is still considered cheap.
Facilities are complete.
Toilets, prayer rooms, and coffee stalls are available.
Spacious parking lot.
summary: This family-friendly attraction is well-suited for activities like camping and picnics, offering a complete range of facilities including toilets, prayer rooms, food stalls, and a large parking area. However, the road leading to the site is in poor condition.

text: Waktu kesini lagi berkabut jadi ngga bisa nikmatin banget. Tiket masuk per orang 20rb, tiket masuk mobil 15rb, parkir 5rb. Udaranya seger bau-bau belerang gitu
english_translation: It was foggy when I came here, so I couldn't enjoy it much. The entrance fee is 20,000 IDR per person, 15,000 IDR per car, and parking is 5,000 IDR. The air is fresh with a sulfur smell.
summary: The attraction is accessible by car and provides parking, though it charges separate fees for per-person entrance, vehicle entry, and parking. The site offers an outdoor experience in a natural environment characterized by fresh air and a distinct sulfur smell.

text: Tempat wisata yg bagus , bersih , menyenangkan 🥰 ada banyak spot poto juga tempat2 yg unik 😘 puas lah main2 kesini cocok dengan segala umur dan acara 😎 jika mau makan kita bisa menyeberang naik perahu , pembayaran menggunakan koin khusus yg sudah kita tukar kan dng mata uang kita ☺️ seruuu …
english_translation: A great tourist spot, clean, and enjoyable 🥰. There are many photo spots and unique places too 😘. Satisfied with playing here, suitable for all ages and occasions 😎. If you want to eat, we can cross by boat. Payment uses special coins that we exchange with our currency ☺️. So much fun…
summary: This clean and enjoyable attraction is suitable for all ages, offering numerous unique photo opportunities and recreational activities. Dining facilities are accessible via a boat trip, and on-site payments are made using special coins that must be exchanged from currency.

text:
Area wisata tertata rapih, cukup bersih, area parkir banyak, tiket masuk tidak terlalu mahal.

Banyak pedagang yg jadi lokal guide dan fotografer - sehingga cukup membantu menemukan spot foto terbaik. Dan kehadiran mereka tidak memaksa utk membeli
english_translation:
The tourist area is well-organized, quite clean, with ample parking. The entrance fee is not too expensive.

Many vendors offer their services as local guides and photographers, which greatly helps in finding the best photo spots. Their presence is not pushy for purchases.
summary: This well-organized and clean tourist attraction is accessible, with ample parking and an affordable entrance fee. For activities, visitors can hire non-pushy local guides and photographers to help locate the best photo spots.

text: Masya Allah... Cakep banget pemandangan nya. Pas di pintu gerbang ngerasa kaya mau masuk ke Jurassic Park. Yang menantang buat jompo belia kaya saya ya jalan kaki yang lumayan jauh. Tapi worth it. Pemandangan bagus, adem, sejuk, asri. Btw enak ya ditempat dingin, kelayapan seharian juga ga bikin keringetan.
english_translation: Masya Allah... the view is so beautiful. At the gate, I felt like I was entering Jurassic Park. The challenging part for an "elderly youth" like me is the rather long walk. But it's worth it. The view is good, it's cool, refreshing, and green. By the way, it's nice in a cold place; roaming around all day doesn't make you sweat.
summary: This scenic attraction requires a significant amount of walking, which may be challenging for some, but offers rewarding views in a cool, refreshing climate that makes exploring on foot pleasant.

text: masuknya 25rb, tamannya ga terlalu luas tp ditata dengan sangat rapi. waktu kesana ada keluarga yg lagi gathering dan suasananya bagus bgt. parkir motor 2rb dan pas masuk kita bisa pake topi bambu buat foto foto. topinya gratis dipakai selama di dalam wisata. ibu penjaga tiketnya ramah sekali jadi merasa sangat disambut
english_translation: Entrance fee is 25,000 IDR. The park isn't very large, but it's very neatly arranged. When I visited, there was a family having a gathering, and the atmosphere was really nice. Motorcycle parking is 2,000 IDR. Upon entering, you can use bamboo hats for photos. The hats are free to use within the tourist area. The ticket attendant was very friendly, so I felt very welcomed.
summary: This small, well-organized park charges a 25,000 IDR entrance fee and a 2,000 IDR fee for motorcycle parking. The site offers complimentary bamboo hats for photos and is a welcoming venue suitable for family gatherings.

text: Buat yg ma ke SANGHYANG HELEEUT, harus pas musim kemarau, jangan pas musim hujan, karena kalau musim hujan, airnya pasti keruh. Dan siapkan mental fisik, karena perjalanan menuju lokasi -+ 1 jam
english_translation: For those who want to go to SANGHYANG HELEEUT, it must be during the dry season, not the rainy season, because if it's the rainy season, the water will definitely be murky. And prepare mentally and physically, because the journey to the location is about 1 hour.
summary: Accessing Sanghyang Heleut involves a physically demanding one-hour journey. For optimal water clarity, a visit is recommended during the dry season, as the water becomes murky in the rainy season.

text: keren tempat y...buat Mangement Orchid coba klo ada kopi buat kami2 driver Traveloka lebih keren bangeeettt
english_translation: Cool place, y... For Orchid Management, if you had coffee for us Traveloka drivers, it would be even cooler!
summary: A driver for a travel service indicates the attraction is accessible but suggests its facilities could be improved by adding a coffee service for drivers.

text:
Bagus tempatnya..
Tapi buset deh pop mie beli di dalem harganya 18.000, pop mienya ada lapisan emasnya kali ya... perasaan pop mienya sama air panasnya juga sama, apa jangan2 air panasnya dimasak di neraka ?, gilak kali, udah bayar tiket masuk jajanan harganya selangit, mikir2 deh kalo mo jajan disitu !
english_translation:
The place is nice...
But wow, the Pop Mie bought inside costs 18,000, maybe the Pop Mie has a layer of gold on it... I feel like the Pop Mie and the hot water are the same, or maybe the hot water was cooked in hell? Crazy, you've already paid for the entrance ticket and the snacks are outrageously priced, think twice if you want to snack there!
summary: This tourist attraction requires an entrance fee and provides on-site food facilities, though the reviewer warns that snacks sold within the venue are extremely overpriced.

text: Pemandangannya seperti danau biasa tetapi bagian terbaiknya adalah ketika Anda bisa melakukan lompat tebing, harganya terlalu mahal terutama ketika Anda pertama kali pergi ke sini. Saya sarankan Anda membawa teman yang tahu tempat danau suci sehingga Anda tidak perlu menggunakan pemandu
english_translation: The scenery is like a regular lake, but the best part is when you can cliff dive. It's too expensive, especially when you go here for the first time. I suggest you bring a friend who knows the sacred lake spot so you don't have to use a guide.
summary: The site's main activity is cliff diving, but it is considered expensive. To mitigate costs, visitors can navigate the area with a knowledgeable friend instead of hiring a guide.

text: Tempatnya cukup luas. Hanya perlu beberapa jam untuk eksplorasi seluruh bagian. Banyak bagian yg exclude dari tiket masuk. Bunganya cantik dan terawat. Makanannya enak, booth coin mudah diakses. Harga makanan rata ±25k (berat) dan ±15k (ringan). Perahu variatif bentuknya. Banyak spot foto di seluruh bagian
english_translation: The place is quite spacious. It only takes a few hours to explore the entire area. Many sections are excluded from the entrance ticket. The flowers are beautiful and well-maintained. The food is delicious, and the coin booths are easily accessible. Food prices are around ±25k (heavy) and ±15k (light). The boats come in various shapes. There are many photo spots throughout the area.
summary: This attraction can be explored within a few hours and offers activities such as admiring well-maintained flower gardens, taking photos at numerous spots, and enjoying various boat rides. Food facilities are easily accessible and affordably priced. A key accessibility detail is that the main entrance ticket does not include access to all sections of the site.

text: Ekspetasi tinggi.. Pas datang, rodo kecewa. Tempat gak terawat , 1 spot foto gak bisa digunakan. Padahal yg booming spot tsb
english_translation: High expectations. When it arrived, a bit disappointed. The place is not well-maintained, 1 photo spot is unusable. Even though that spot is what's trending.
summary: The attraction is poorly maintained, with a popular photo spot being unusable, which restricts a key visitor activity.

text:
Waktu kesini jalan keatas menuju kawah sempet hujan dan berkabut, hati" kalau ke sini waktu hujan karna jalannya cukup terjal dan berkelok.
Untungnya waktu sampe atas udah cerah dan tidak berawan. Udaranya sejuk dan cari top view biar angle fotonya bagus hahahaha
english_translation:
When I came here, the path leading up to the crater was raining and foggy. Be careful if you come here during the rain because the path is quite steep and winding.
Fortunately, when I reached the top, it was already clear and cloudless. The air was cool and I looked for the top view so the photo angle would be good hahaha.
summary: Access to the crater is via a steep, winding path that requires caution, particularly in rainy or foggy conditions. Upon reaching the summit, visitors can enjoy cool air and scenic views, which are ideal for photography when the weather clears.

text:
Tempat yg nyaman sejuk untuk liburan bersama anak anak dan keluarga
Makanan enak enak harga juga masih terjangkau
Semoga kedepan nya ada akses untuk yg bawa stoler / kursi roda , soalnya banyak tangga yg tidak bisa di lalui stoler harus diangkat
Toilet bersih nyaman
Mushola juga tersedia
english_translation:
A comfortable, cool place for a holiday with children and family.
The food is delicious and the prices are still affordable.
Hopefully in the future there will be access for those who bring strollers/wheelchairs, as there are many stairs that cannot be passed with strollers and have to be lifted.
The toilets are clean and comfortable.
A prayer room is also available.
summary: The attraction is a family-friendly destination featuring clean toilets, a prayer room, and affordable, high-quality food. Its primary drawback is a lack of accessibility, as numerous stairs prevent the use of strollers and wheelchairs.

text: Tempat yang sangat bagus. Datang waktu sore hari, 2-3 jam sebelum tutup, nikmati suasana sore dan malam dengan lampu-lampu yang sudah dinyalakan. Jalanannya bersih dan cuacanya sejuk. Toilet lumayan bersih. Bisa duduk santai sambil dengerin musik.
english_translation: A very nice place. Come in the afternoon, 2-3 hours before closing, enjoy the afternoon and evening atmosphere with the lights already on. The streets are clean and the weather is cool. The toilets are quite clean. You can sit and relax while listening to music.
summary: This attraction offers a relaxing atmosphere with well-maintained facilities, including clean toilets. Recommended activities include listening to music and enjoying the ambiance, particularly in the late afternoon and evening when the site is illuminated.

text: Tempatnya bagus bgt sbnrnya, recomended buat yg suka camp. Tambah lg ads fasilitas musholla di area camping. Cuma sayangnya kamar mandi di area camping msh kurang memadai, smg kedepannya bisa diperbanyak lg jumlah kmr mandinya, jd gaperlu turun ke bawah kalau mau ke toilet.
english_translation: The place is really good actually, recommended for those who like camping. Plus, there are prayer facilities in the camping area. It's just a shame that the bathrooms in the camping area are still inadequate, hopefully in the future the number of bathrooms can be increased, so we don't have to go downstairs to use the toilet.
summary: Recommended for camping, this site offers prayer facilities but has an insufficient number of bathrooms in the camping area, requiring visitors to use toilets located on a lower level.

text: Tempat wisata yang wajib di kunjungi ketika di lembang. Disana banyak penjual gelang dan aksesoris...,, sangat ramah,, menawarkan jadi fotografer dan bahkan tourguide.. Tetapi mereka tidak mau meminta bayaran....,, mereka mau repot2 tanpa dibayar. Untuk menghargai mereka..belilah dagangan mereka
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot when in Lembang. There are many vendors selling bracelets and accessories... they are very friendly, offering to be photographers and even tour guides. But they don't want to be paid... they go through the trouble without payment. To appreciate them, buy their merchandise.
summary: This tourist location features friendly local vendors who sell merchandise like bracelets and accessories. These vendors also provide complimentary, informal services such as photography and tour guiding, with visitors encouraged to show appreciation by purchasing their products.

text: Tampatnya enak untuk menghilangkan penat, suasana sejuk dan banyak area bermain buat anak-anak cocok, ada adventure, mini golf, kelinci, flaying fox dan saat mau naik ke tempat parkir sudah ada angkutan yang siap membawa kita kembali gratis
english_translation: The place is nice for relieving fatigue, cool atmosphere and many playgrounds for children are suitable, there is adventure, mini golf, rabbits, flying fox and when going up to the parking lot there is already transportation ready to take us back for free.
summary: This family-friendly attraction offers various activities, including playgrounds, mini golf, a flying fox, and rabbit encounters. For accessibility, complimentary transportation is available to return visitors to the parking area.

text: Pelayan ramah, areanya sangat luas.. Bagus dan indah sampe pegel muter muter.. Cuma mungkin untuk harga wahana (baik kota mini /floating market ) agar lebih murah karena saya rasa tidak sesuai dengan experience nya, atau bisa ditambah keseruannya agar setimpal dengan yg dibayar..
english_translation: The staff is friendly, the area is very spacious.. It's so good and beautiful that my feet hurt from walking around.. It's just that maybe the price of the attractions (both mini town / floating market) could be cheaper because I feel it doesn't match the experience, or maybe add more fun so it's worth what you pay..
summary: This spacious attraction has friendly staff but requires extensive walking. While it features activities like a mini town and a floating market, they are considered overpriced for the experience offered.

text: Perjalanan lumayan panjang dengan jalur mobil yg pas pasan bahkan ada yg hanya cukup untuk 1 mobil, sampai parkiran harus jalan kaki atau naik ojeg sekitar 1 km menuju curug, tp semua terbayar dg pemandangan curug yang indah...👍 …
english_translation: The journey was quite long with a narrow car path, some only wide enough for one car, and from the parking lot, you have to walk or take a motorbike taxi for about 1 km to the waterfall, but it was all worth it with the beautiful view of the waterfall...👍
summary: Access to the waterfall is challenging, involving a narrow road to a parking lot, from which visitors must then walk or take a 1 km motorbike taxi ride to the site.

text: Htm kisaran 55rb per orang (termasuk harga tiket masuk dan parkir). Tempatnya cocok bgt buat healing, suasanya sejuk dan nyaman. Cuma masakan di cafe dalem kurang pas rasanya, harganya jg agak mahal, jadi better yang mau kesini bawa makanan dan minuman asik gelar tiker sendiri buat picnic. Enjoy! ☺️✨
english_translation: Around IDR 55k per person (including entrance fee and parking). The place is very suitable for healing, the atmosphere is cool and comfortable. It's just that the food at the cafe inside isn't quite right in taste, and the prices are a bit expensive, so it's better to bring your own food and drinks if you want to come here and lay out your own mat for a picnic. Enjoy! ☺️✨
summary: The attraction, accessible for a fee of around IDR 55k that includes parking, offers a cool and comfortable atmosphere ideal for relaxing activities like picnicking. While an on-site cafe is available, it is noted for expensive and dissatisfying food, so bringing your own provisions is recommended.

text: Senang sekali bisa sampai gua kahuripsn meski kawah upas ditutup..sempat hujan berteduh diwarung sambil ngopi..sejuk segar ..naik kuda lumayan mahal 75 rb tapi tukang kudanya baik & ramah..yg penting anak happy naik kuda nya.
english_translation: So happy to reach Kahuripan cave even though Upas crater was closed. It rained for a while, so we took shelter at a stall and had coffee. It was cool and refreshing. Riding a horse was quite expensive at 75,000 Rupiah, but the horse keeper was kind and friendly. The most important thing is that the child was happy riding the horse.
summary: Kahuripan cave was accessible and equipped with stalls offering shelter and coffee. The main activity mentioned is horse riding, which, despite its cost, is a child-friendly experience managed by friendly staff.

text: Hamparan batu seperti karang dan pemandangan sejauh mata memandang membuat kita rilek dan ini membuktikan bahwa dulunya adalah lautan ...yg menyurut... ao kapan lagi berkunjung ke sini bro n sis... keburu tiket mehong
english_translation: The expanse of rocks like coral and the view as far as the eye can see make us relax, and this proves that it was once an ocean... that receded... When will you visit here again, bros and sis... before the tickets get expensive
summary: The attraction offers expansive, relaxing views and unique coral-like rock formations, which suggest a prehistoric ocean floor. Access to the site requires a ticket, and potential visitors are advised that prices may increase.

text: Pemandangan bagus... tp blm nyaman klo ada monyet 🙏😊 …
english_translation: Great view... but it's not comfortable if there are monkeys 🙏😊
summary: The attraction offers an excellent view, but the presence of monkeys may detract from the comfort of the experience.

text:
Tempat ini lumayan ok untuk rekreasi keluarga dan teman.. tetapi untuk menuju ke tempat Sanghyang heuleut ini harus di tempuh jalan kaki yg lumayan jauh..😂
Sekitar 2 kilo meter dengan perkiraan waktu 1½ jam jalan kaki..
disarankan untuk mempersiapkan fisik untuk menempuh perjalanan menuju tempat Sanghyang heuleut ini..😅
english_translation:
This place is quite okay for family and friends recreation.. but to get to Sanghyang Heuleut, you have to walk quite a distance.. 😂
About 2 kilometers with an estimated walking time of 1½ hours..
It is recommended to prepare physically for the journey to Sanghyang Heuleut.. 😅
summary: Sanghyang Heuleut is a recreational site suitable for groups, but accessing it requires a physically demanding 2-kilometer walk that takes approximately 1.5 hours, so visitors should be prepared for the trek.

text:
Cocok untuk tempat camping karena tempatnya luas juga bersih, disini dapat liat sunrise dengan pemandangan kota lembang dari atas yang masih tertutup kabut
Kalau kesini jangan terlalu siang karena jam 6.15 sudah mulai cerah, jadi sebelum set 6 harus sudah ada disini kalau ingin cuaca yang bagus.
english_translation:
Suitable for camping because the place is spacious and clean, here you can see the sunrise with a view of Lembang town from above, still covered in mist.
If you come here, don't come too late because it starts to get bright at 6:15 AM, so you should be here before 6 AM if you want good weather.
summary: This spacious and clean site is suitable for camping and offers misty sunrise views over Lembang. For the best experience, visitors should arrive before 6 AM.

text:
Lokasinya di area punclut ddieland tiket mulai 50rban dan ada tiket terusannya 65 & 85rb sesuai pilihan,

Disediakan mobil wara wiri sampai lokasi kalau bis besar turun di depan, Hiace & Elf bisa masuk langsung ke bawah
english_translation:
The location is in the Punclut area. Tickets start at 50,000 rupiah, and there are continuous tickets for 65,000 and 85,000 rupiah depending on your choice.

A shuttle car is provided to the location if you arrive by large bus, which has to drop off at the front. Hiace and Elf can go directly down.
summary: This attraction in the Punclut area offers a tiered ticketing system. For accessibility, a shuttle service is provided for visitors arriving by large bus, which must stop at the entrance, whereas smaller vehicles are permitted to drive directly to the location.

text: Taman bunga dan kebun buah yg cantik. Terdapat bermacam2 jenis bunga dan buah. Cocok untuk tempat hunting foto atau sekedar menikmati indahnya hamparan taman bunga. Tersedia beberapa spot foto yg memang sudah disiapkan oleh pihak pengelola. Disediakan topi anyaman jg yg bisa dipinjam gratis.
english_translation: Beautiful flower garden and fruit orchard. There are various types of flowers and fruits. Suitable for a photo hunting spot or simply to enjoy the beauty of the flower garden. There are several photo spots that have been prepared by the management. Woven hats are also available for free loan.
summary: This flower garden and fruit orchard is an ideal location for photography and sightseeing. To enhance the visitor experience, the management provides designated photo spots and offers a complimentary loan of woven hats.

text: Tempat nya keren abis, walaupun lumayan jauh dari tempat parkir tapi udah sampe cape langsung ilang,cuma hati" kalo ujan jalan nya jadi licin banget sama suka ada air deres dari atas ke bawah..
english_translation: The place is super cool, even though it's quite a walk from the parking lot, the tiredness disappears as soon as you arrive. Just be careful when it rains because the path gets very slippery and there's often a strong flow of water from top to bottom.
summary: The attraction is accessible via a considerable walk from the parking lot. Visitors should be cautious during rainy weather, as the path becomes slippery and is subject to significant water runoff.

text:
Lumayan bagus buat keluarga besar atau kecil
Wahananya juga lumayan
Untuk makanan lumayan iya siapkan dompet aja sama wahana dompet yang tebel 😁
Kalau sekedar foto2 ya tenang gratis apa lagi jalan- jalan 😁 santai  👍 …
english_translation:
Pretty good for a big or small family.
The rides are also quite good.
For the food, it's decent. Just prepare your wallet, and a thick wallet for the rides! 😁
If it's just for photos, then it's free, what more for a stroll! 😁 Relaxing 👍…
summary: This family-friendly attraction features good rides and decent food, though both are expensive. Visitors can also enjoy free, relaxing activities like strolling and taking photos.

text: Tidak banyak yang bisa dilihat di sini. Butuh waktu sekitar 1 jam untuk menyelesaikan semua tamasya. Baru dibuka 4 bulan yang lalu.
english_translation: There's not much to see here. It takes about 1 hour to complete all the sightseeing. It only opened 4 months ago.
summary: As a recently opened site, this attraction offers limited sightseeing that can be completed in approximately one hour.

text: Kebun yang indah, berbagai jenis bunga ada disini, pelataran kebun cukup luas, untuk berphoto ria atau selfie, view telah disiapkan untuk photo, bunga yang aneka warna menambah serunya photo, mau beli bunga atau hasil kebun bisa disini, lokasi cukup strategis
english_translation: A beautiful garden, various types of flowers are here, the garden grounds are quite spacious, for taking photos or selfies, views have been prepared for photos, the multicolored flowers add to the excitement of the photos, you can buy flowers or garden produce here, the location is quite strategic
summary: This strategically located and spacious garden offers a variety of colorful flowers and designated photo opportunities. On-site facilities allow visitors to purchase flowers and local garden produce.

text: Salah satu tempat wisata Lembang yang lama tapi masih favorit. Suasana danaunya yang luas makin mantap sambil dinikmati dengan bandrek dan pisang goreng gula aren di pujaseranya enak. Bisa naik perahu jg sambil diterpa udara lembang yg sejuk. Kostum jepangnya jg bagus2 dan premium.
english_translation: One of Lembang's older but still favorite tourist spots. The atmosphere of the vast lake becomes even more delightful enjoyed with bandrek and palm sugar fried bananas at the delicious food court. You can also ride a boat while being caressed by Lembang's cool air. The Japanese costumes are also nice and premium.
summary: This popular Lembang attraction, centered around a large lake, offers facilities such as a food court and boat rentals. Activities available to visitors include enjoying local cuisine, taking a boat ride, and renting high-quality Japanese costumes.

text: Wana wisata dikaki Gn Tangkuban Perahu  dgn suasana alam yg indah dan sejuk.  Cocok utk penyuka Hiking, Motocros dan Sepeda Gunung.  Jalan menuju lokasi mulus tapi sempit dan penuh tanjakan .  Kondisi lingkungan sekitar cukup kotor banayk sampah dari para pengunjung tanpa pernah dibersihkan.
english_translation: Tourism at the foot of Mount Tangkuban Perahu with a beautiful and cool natural atmosphere. Suitable for hiking, motocross, and mountain biking enthusiasts. The road to the location is smooth but narrow and full of inclines. The surrounding environment is quite dirty with a lot of trash from visitors, never cleaned up.
summary: This tourist site at the base of Mount Tangkuban Perahu offers activities such as hiking, motocross, and mountain biking. Although the location is accessible via a smooth road, it is narrow and steep. The area's pleasant atmosphere is diminished by poor cleanliness and a significant amount of uncollected visitor trash.

text: Bagus msh alami...akses nya msh blm di buat yg bagus....😀😀😀 …
english_translation: Good, still natural...the access hasn't been made nice yet....😀😀😀
summary: This natural attraction is praised for its undeveloped state, though its access routes are not yet improved.

text: Wisata air terjun yang dikelola cukup baik.. Untuk air terjun nya menurut saya biasa aja, di sana lebih cocok untuk foto2 saja.. Dari lokasi parkir ke lokasi wisata ada Suttle bus yang siap antar jemput
english_translation: The waterfall attraction is quite well-managed. As for the waterfall itself, I think it's just ordinary; it's more suitable for taking photos. From the parking lot to the attraction, there is a shuttle bus ready to pick you up and drop you off.
summary: The well-managed attraction is easily accessible via a shuttle bus service from the parking lot. While the waterfall is described as ordinary, the site is primarily recommended for photography.

text: Bersih tempatnya, parkir rapi, lumayan menghibur ada wisata naek kudanya juga...
english_translation: The place is clean, parking is tidy, it's quite entertaining with horse riding tours too...
summary: This well-maintained attraction offers organized parking and provides entertaining activities, such as horse riding tours.

text: Tempat wisata dan bermain untuk keluarga yang tidak boleh terlewatkan, selagi dibandung cobalah mampir ke lembang
english_translation: A must-visit tourist and play destination for families, while you're in Bandung, try stopping by Lembang.
summary: This family-friendly attraction in Lembang, accessible to tourists visiting Bandung, is a recommended destination offering recreational and sightseeing activities.

text: tempat wisata yg Ada didaerah punclut, memurutku ini tempat wisata hanya untuk foto foto saja, kuliner masih minim harga ticket masuk  50.000 Dan ternyata untuk masuk jembatan harus membeli tiket masuk lagi seharga 15.000/orang, paling cocok kalai datang siang/pagi hari karena klo siang cuacanya panas,,
english_translation: Tourist attractions in the Punclut area, in my opinion, are only for taking photos. Culinary options are still limited. The entrance ticket price is 50,000, and it turns out that to enter the bridge, you have to buy another entrance ticket for 15,000 per person. It's best to come in the afternoon/morning because it's hot during the day.
summary: This tourist attraction is primarily for photography and offers limited culinary facilities. Access requires an initial entrance fee, with an additional separate charge for specific features like the bridge. It is recommended to visit in the morning or afternoon to avoid the midday heat.

text: Dari goha Pawon mampir ke sini jarak cuma 300 m, Indahnya luar biasa, tiket berdua 29ribu dapat minuman 2 botol yg kecil, jng lupa klo kesini bawa topi atau kaca mata krn panas klo siang, luar biasa batu nya sng indah
english_translation: From Goha Pawon, stopping by here is only a 300m distance. The beauty is extraordinary. The ticket for two is 29 thousand and you get 2 small bottles of drink. Don't forget to bring a hat or sunglasses when you come here because it's hot during the day. The rocks are incredibly beautiful.
summary: Conveniently located 300m from Goha Pawon, this attraction features beautiful rock formations. The admission fee includes complimentary drinks, but visitors are advised to bring sun protection as the site is hot and exposed during the day.

text: Disinilah cerita itu di mulai, seorang anak yang menyukai ibu kandungnya sendiri, beberapa sejarah banyak sekali yang mengenai asmara. I'll not forget this memory ❣️ so wonderfull place and clean.
english_translation: This is where the story begins, a child who loves his biological mother. History is full of romances. I'll not forget this memory ❣️ so wonderful place and clean.
summary: The reviewer describes the attraction as a wonderfully clean and memorable place, though no specific details on accessibility, facilities, or activities are provided.

text: Puas sih kesini. Harga tiketnya kalau weekday cuma 10k aja dan dapet minum. Tempatnya adem dan banyak spot foto keren. Paling enak kalau lagi sepi, bisa puas foto-foto dan nggak bising juga. Posisinya juga deket kalau dari arah dago giri dan tempatnya mudah ditemukan. Top deh, recommended banget.
english_translation: I'm satisfied with visiting here. The ticket price on weekdays is only 10k and it includes a drink. The place is cool and has many great photo spots. It's best when it's not crowded, so you can take photos to your heart's content without it being noisy. Its location is also close if you're coming from the Dago Giri direction, and the place is easy to find. Top-notch, highly recommended.
summary: This easily accessible attraction, conveniently located near Dago Giri, is recommended for its numerous photo spots. The site offers an affordable weekday ticket that includes a complimentary drink, and visitors will find the best experience for photography is during less crowded times.

text: Tempatnya sejuk karena byk pohon2 pinus cocok utk refreshing, fasilitasnya juga lumayan, cuma jalan akses khusus masuk ke lokasi belum mulus, masih berbatu dan licin kalau hujan.. Semoga ke depannya bisa dikelola lebih baik lagi supaya bisa menjadi salah satu obyek wisata yang diminati...
english_translation: The place is cool because there are many pine trees, suitable for refreshing. The facilities are also decent, only the access road to the location is not yet smooth, still rocky and slippery when it rains. Hopefully in the future it can be managed better to become one of the popular tourist attractions.
summary: This tourist attraction offers a refreshing atmosphere among its pine trees and is equipped with decent facilities, but accessibility is a challenge due to a rocky road that becomes slippery when it rains.

text: Sungguh indah tempat ini, kita pakai jasa bapak buat ambil foto. Keren2 hasilnya, karena beliau tahu harus ambilnya dari mana. Untuk harga tiket Rp. 14 rb..Untuk parkir Rp. 5 rb. Kondisi sekarang masih dalam pengembangan karena tamannya belum jadi. Kalau sudah tumbuh bunganya pasti akan makin cantik.
english_translation: This place is truly beautiful, we used the Bapak's service to take photos. The results are amazing because he knows exactly where to take them from. The ticket price is Rp. 14 thousand. Parking is Rp. 5 thousand. The current condition is still under development because the garden isn't finished yet. When the flowers bloom, it will surely be even more beautiful.
summary: The attraction, currently under development with an unfinished garden, is accessible for an entrance fee of Rp. 14,000 and a parking fee of Rp. 5,000. Key facilities include parking, and a notable activity is the availability of an expert local photography service.

text:
Jalan dari arah Jakarta/Subang sampai gerbang ada penyekatan Ganjil Genap PPKM, tp kalo mo ke sini aja diperbolehkan, kecuali yg ke arah Bandung
Lama gak ke sini, prasarana sudah banyak perbaikan, lebih bagus. Tukang foto, souvenir jg ramah2.
english_translation:
From Jakarta/Subang, there is a Odd-Even PPKM (public activity restriction) checkpoint until the gate, but if you only want to come here, you are allowed, except for those going to Bandung.
Haven't been here in a long time, the facilities have been greatly improved, it's better. The photographers and souvenir sellers are also very friendly.
summary: Despite regional travel restrictions, this attraction is accessible and features significantly improved facilities, with on-site services including friendly photographers and souvenir vendors.

text: Taman bunga dan sayuran yang lumayan luas nyaman buat wisata sambil mengajari anak tentang bunga dan sayuran. Hanya sayang banyak tanaman sayuran yg seperti tidak ter urus dengan baik jd bnyk yg layu da rontok daun nya, semoga kedepan nya bisa lebih d perhatikan lagi untuk kebersihan dan perawatan tanaman buah dan sayuran nya.
english_translation: The rather spacious flower and vegetable garden is comfortable for a trip while teaching children about flowers and vegetables. It's a shame, though, that many vegetable plants seem neglected, with many wilting and losing their leaves. Hopefully, in the future, more attention can be given to the cleanliness and maintenance of the fruit and vegetable plants.
summary: The attraction features a spacious and comfortable garden suitable for educational family outings, though the vegetable plants suffer from neglect and poor maintenance.

text: Perjalanan ke lokasi banyak variasi nya.jembatan kayu..jembatan batang kayu..menyebrangi sungai..naik turun batu..menyusuri anak sungai..menarik👍..dianjurkan pakai sepatu boot..biar ga licin..tempat indah..sayang keburu kecapean ga sempet berenang..😁..ini jalur anak muda.😂 …
english_translation: The journey to the location has many variations. Wooden bridges.. log bridges.. crossing rivers.. climbing up and down rocks.. following streams.. interesting 👍.. recommended to wear boots.. so it's not slippery.. beautiful place.. too bad I got tired and didn't have time to swim.. 😁.. this is a trail for young people. 😂
summary: Access to this scenic attraction requires a physically demanding trek across varied and slippery terrain, including rock climbing and river crossings, making it more suitable for younger visitors. Sturdy boots are recommended for the journey, and swimming is an available activity at the destination.

text:
Tempat wisata disuatu lembah dan bukit bercerita tentang bangunan2 terkenal di benua Eropa,Afrika dan Asia.Keren banget...membawa kita ke berbagai negara dalam satu waktu...keren banget..Spinx,Santorini,menara Pisa dll
Wisata sambil olah raga..setelahnya lapar kita bisa menikmati kuliner yang ada Didaerah tersebut.
english_translation:
A tourist spot in a valley and hills tells the story of famous buildings in Europe, Africa, and Asia. So cool... it takes us to various countries at once... so cool.. Sphinx, Santorini, Leaning Tower of Pisa, etc.
Sightseeing while exercising.. afterwards, we get hungry and can enjoy the local cuisine.
summary: This tourist attraction features replicas of international landmarks set within a hilly landscape, offering an active sightseeing experience that involves considerable walking. On-site facilities include dining options that serve local cuisine for visitors.

text: Lokasinya biasa aja, tp ada air panasnya yg menarik utk di coba
english_translation: The location is ordinary, but the hot spring is interesting to try
summary: While the location is unremarkable, the site's main facility is a hot spring, which is recommended as an interesting activity to try.

text: Tiket masuk 50rb. Tp spot foto disini sangat banyak. Layak untuk harga segitu. Tp memang akses kesini sangat macet apalagi kalau hari weekend dan libur panjang
english_translation: Entrance fee is 50,000 IDR. But there are so many photo spots here. Worth the price. But the access here is very congested, especially on weekends and long holidays.
summary: While the attraction offers numerous photo opportunities for a 50,000 IDR entrance fee, accessing the site is challenging due to heavy traffic congestion, particularly during weekends and holidays.

text: Kalau kesini bawa payung atau pakai topi ya, panas banget. Tempat bagus buat foto2. Lebih baik kalau kesini jangan waktu liburan karena susah banget mau foto kalau terlalu ramai. Dan jangan waktu hujan.
english_translation: If you come here, bring an umbrella or wear a hat, it's very hot. It's a good place for photos. It's better to come here not during holidays because it's very difficult to take pictures if it's too crowded. And don't come when it's raining.
summary: This outdoor attraction is excellent for photography but lacks shelter, making it unsuitable for visits during rain or intense sun without protection. Accessibility for activities like taking pictures is significantly reduced during crowded holiday periods.

text: Tempatnya cocok banget buat camping, hiking atau acara outing. Untuk wahana ada flying fox, shaking bridge, three in one, sama paint ball (kalo ga salah namanya hehe). Alat camping bisa sewa dan untuk harga ga mahal kok, harga wajar. Dan enaknya tuh ga banyak kena biaya. Cuma memang kesan "hutan"-nya kurang kerasa kalau siang.
english_translation: The place is very suitable for camping, hiking, or outing events. For attractions, there are flying fox, shaking bridge, three in one, and paintball (if I'm not mistaken with the name, hehe). Camping equipment can be rented and the prices are not expensive, reasonable prices. And the good thing is, you don't incur many additional costs. However, the "forest" feel is indeed less noticeable during the day.
summary: This budget-friendly destination is ideal for camping, hiking, and group outings, offering activities like a flying fox, shaking bridge, and paintball. The site provides affordable on-site equipment rentals with minimal additional costs, though its natural forest atmosphere is less pronounced during the day.

text: Bagus buat prewedding, harga masih make sense..udh gt dkasih fasilitas guide yg sangat membantu
english_translation: Good for prewedding, the price is still reasonable.. Plus, they provided a very helpful guide.
summary: The site is an affordable venue suitable for pre-wedding activities and provides helpful guided services.

text: Tiket masuk per org 5 rb , parkir mobil 6 rb .. akses jalan menuju kecurug tolong di perbaiki lagi supaya lebih mudah tuk di lewati , Pemandangan di Curug nya asri sekali begituh juga Curug nya indah bangetttt .. memuaskan 😎👍 …
english_translation: Entrance ticket per person is 5 thousand, car parking is 6 thousand. Please fix the access road to the waterfall again so it's easier to pass. The scenery at the waterfall is very beautiful and green, and the waterfall itself is incredibly beautiful... Satisfying 😎👍
summary: The attraction features beautiful waterfall scenery but is difficult to access due to a poor road in need of repair. The site charges a 5,000 per-person entrance fee and a 6,000 fee for car parking.

text: Tempatnya luas banget... Ada banyak pilihan tema foto. Dari kios jajanan terapung, tempat-tempat bertema jepang, disediakan juga penyewaan baju ala jepang. Cocok untuk widata keluarga. Masih satu tempat dengan rainbow garden.
english_translation: The place is very spacious... There are many photo theme options. From floating snack stalls, Japanese-themed spots, they also provide rental of Japanese-style clothing. Suitable for family tours. Still in the same place as Rainbow Garden.
summary: Situated within Rainbow Garden, this spacious and family-friendly attraction provides diverse themed photo opportunities, including a Japanese-themed section with costume rentals. On-site facilities include floating snack stalls.

text: Disana bnyak spot2 foto bagus, ala2 luar negri gitu hihi tapiiiiii Ruameeee bgt,
english_translation: There are many good photo spots there, like abroad haha but it's reeeeally crowded.
summary: The attraction offers numerous scenic photo opportunities but experiences high visitor traffic.

text: Jika sudah melewati perjalanan panjang dari pintu Taman Hutan Raya (Tahura) Dago sekitar 4 km, ada kelegaan saat tiba di curug Omas ini. Sayangnya curug hanya dapat dilihat dari jembatan yang ada dan tidak bisa turun ke sungainya. Sungainya juga kotor dan banyak sampahnya.
english_translation: After a long journey of about 4 km from the entrance of Dago Forest Park (Tahura), there is a sense of relief upon arriving at Curug Omas. Unfortunately, the waterfall can only be seen from the existing bridge and it's not possible to go down to the river. The river is also dirty and full of trash.
summary: Curug Omas is accessible via a 4 km journey within Dago Forest Park. On-site facilities are limited to a viewing bridge, as direct access to the polluted river and waterfall is prohibited.

text: Tempatnya bersih banget,Sangat menyenangkan dan memuaskan,dan yang paling aku suka adalah keunikan di floating market yaitu jika ingin membeli makanan disana harus pakai koin,dan ada banyak sekali spot foto yang nyentrik gak kalah sama yang di luar-luar.
english_translation: The place is very clean, very pleasant and satisfying, and what I liked most was the uniqueness at the floating market, which is that you have to use coins to buy food there, and there are so many quirky photo spots, no less than those outside.
summary: This clean and pleasant attraction features a unique floating market where food is purchased with coins, as well as numerous quirky photo opportunities.

text:
Harga tiket masuk kalo buat maen doang cuma 7,5K tapi kalo ngecamp 17,5K. Parkirnya agak mahal 10K kalo buat camp. Jalan dari bawah/pos ke puncak atas itu sekitar 15menit.
Kalo udah di atas wagelaseh ada pohon pinus dan tugu atau monumen.
english_translation: The entrance fee for just playing is 7.5K, but for camping it's 17.5K. Parking is a bit expensive at 10K if you're camping. The walk from the bottom/post to the top peak takes about 15 minutes. Once you're at the top, wow, there are pine trees and a monument.
summary: This attraction offers both day visits and camping, with separate entrance fees and an additional parking charge for campers. Accessing the main peak area, which features a monument and pine trees, requires a short 15-minute walk from the entrance.

text: Curug paling dekat hanya 300m dari pintu masuk. Untuk pergi ke curug paling jauh(curug Tilu), akses jalannya masih belum di tata dengan rapih, kita seperti mengikuti jalur pipa air warga, saat sampai di tempat(curug paling jauh), wisatawan tidak boleh berenang
english_translation: The closest waterfall is only 300m from the entrance. To get to the furthest waterfall (Curug Tilu), the access road is not yet neatly arranged, it's like we're following the villagers' water pipe path. When you reach the location (furthest waterfall), tourists are not allowed to swim.
summary: The site features an easily accessible waterfall near the entrance, while the path to the furthest waterfall is undeveloped. At this more remote location, swimming is not permitted.

text: Bagus. Sayang datang nya pas pandemi jd bbrp wahana tutup
english_translation: Good. Too bad it came during the pandemic so several attractions were closed.
summary: The review indicates a positive visit, but notes that accessibility to various attractions was limited due to pandemic-related closures.

text: Tempat yg sangat cocok untuk kembali ke alam.. harga terjangkau di tipe cemara dengan kapasitas 6 orang dan dapat sarapan buffet
english_translation: A very suitable place to return to nature.. affordable price for the cemara type with a capacity of 6 people and includes buffet breakfast
summary: This nature destination offers affordable group accommodation for up to six people, with an included buffet breakfast.

text: Ini lokasi ngemping paling deket dari wilayah cimahi, tempatnya adem nyaman, asri, hutan pinus nya lebat, spot fotonya banyak, air terjunnya seger bisa dipake mandi atau sekedar maen air, untuk prewed juga bagus
english_translation: This is the closest camping location to the Cimahi area, the place is cool, comfortable, beautiful, the pine forest is dense, there are many photo spots, the waterfall is refreshing and can be used for bathing or just playing in the water, it's also good for pre-weddings
summary: Conveniently located near the Cimahi area, this campsite features a dense pine forest and a waterfall suitable for bathing and water play. The site offers numerous photo spots, making it a popular location for activities like camping and pre-wedding photoshoots.

text: Gunung putri tempat yg indah untuk menikmati view kota dari tempat ketinggian. Jarak dari tempat parkir mobil ke puncak kira2 satu kilometer dengan elevasi 100. Ada warung kopi n indomie serta kamar mandi di dekat tempat parkir mobil. Nyaman dikunjungi saat sunrise n sunset
english_translation: Gunung Putri is a beautiful place to enjoy city views from a high vantage point. The distance from the car park to the summit is approximately one kilometer with an elevation of 100 meters. There are coffee and Indomie stalls, as well as restrooms near the car park. It's a comfortable place to visit during sunrise and sunset.
summary: Gunung Putri offers scenic city views, particularly at sunrise and sunset, from a summit accessible via a one-kilometer walk with a 100-meter elevation gain from the car park. Basic facilities, including food stalls and restrooms, are available near the parking area.

text: Salah satu wisata alam yang menjadi andalan kota kembang ini cukup ramai dikunjungi wisatawan. Tersedia shuttle dari parkiran bawah menuju puncak. Atau yg membawa mobil pribadi bisa langsung parkir di puncak.
english_translation: One of the natural attractions that is the mainstay of the flower city is quite crowded with tourists. A shuttle is available from the lower parking area to the summit. Or those who bring their private car can park directly at the summit.
summary: This popular natural attraction offers convenient access to its summit, providing a shuttle service from a lower parking area and also allowing visitors to drive private vehicles directly to a parking lot at the top.

text:
Ma syaa Allah... takjub akan kebesaran Ciptaan Allah SWT. Skrg Masuknya harus pake scan vaksin.
Tiket 30.000 hari libur
tiket mobil 35.000
parkir 5.000
Alhamdulillah rapih bersih nyaman, para pedagang juga ramah² bs minta tolong juga untuk potoin pengunjung.
Seru banget .... enjoy.
👍👍
english_translation:
Ma syaa Allah... amazed by the greatness of Allah SWT's Creation. Now entry requires a vaccination scan.
Ticket 30,000 on holidays
Car ticket 35,000
Parking 5,000
Alhamdulillah, neat, clean, comfortable, the vendors are also friendly, they can also be asked for help to take photos of visitors.
So much fun.... enjoy.
👍👍
summary: Access to this well-maintained and comfortable attraction requires a vaccination scan. The site provides parking and features friendly vendors who may assist with taking photos. Visitors should be aware of specific fees for holiday admission, vehicles, and parking.

text: HTM 30rb/orang (usia 2 tahun ke atas diihitung tiket).. lumayan banyak tempat baru, sayangnya mayoritas harus bayar lagi klo masuk. Tempat sholat pria dan wanita sudah dipisah, sayangnya tempat wudhu masih jadi 1. Sebaiknya pengunjung kesini dilarang merokok.
english_translation: HTM 30k/person (ages 2 and up are charged for a ticket).. quite a lot of new places, unfortunately, the majority require additional payment for entry. The prayer areas for men and women are separated, unfortunately, the ablution areas are still combined. Visitors here should preferably be prohibited from smoking.
summary: This attraction charges an entrance fee for visitors aged two and older, with most new activities requiring additional payments. The site provides gender-separated prayer rooms, but their ablution facilities are shared, and the reviewer observed that smoking is permitted on the premises.

text: sayang curug dan sungainya banyak sampah.. ga seindah yang di bayangkan
english_translation:
sayang curug dan sungainya banyak sampah.. ga seindah yang di bayangkan
It's a shame the waterfalls and rivers are full of trash.. not as beautiful as imagined
summary: This attraction, featuring waterfalls and rivers, is reported to have a significant trash problem, which detracts from its natural beauty and the overall visitor experience.

text: Nikmati semua pemandangan ini di camp ciwangun indah... Direkomendasikan untuk hiking atau outing keluarga
english_translation: Enjoy all these sights at the beautiful Camp Ciwangun... Recommended for hiking or family outings
summary: Camp Ciwangun is a scenic destination suitable for family outings, offering activities such as hiking and sightseeing.

text: Waktu tahun 2015 kesana masih rame ya, tahun 2021 balik kesana sepi, yang dagang di airnya juga sedikit.. tapi banyak kenangan lah disana... tetep top lah semoga lekas pulih dan kembali rame 🙏🏻 …
english_translation: Back in 2015 when I went there, it was still crowded. In 2021, I went back and it was quiet, and there were few vendors on the water... but there are many memories there... still top-notch. I hope it recovers quickly and becomes crowded again 🙏🏻…
summary: This tourist attraction is currently quiet with low visitor traffic, a significant change from its previously crowded state. This has impacted activities, as there has been a noticeable reduction in the number of water-based vendors.

text: Seru nih bisa ajak anak2 main ke floating market, khusunya ke kota mini...disini anak2 bisa latihan profesi..ada jadi chef, suster, pemadam kebakaran, polisi, dekor kue, salon dll, nah kalau utk chef atau yg profesinya bikin2 gtu..nanti hasil karyanya boleh dibawa, yg pasti anak2 excited bgt...emaknya juga😅 …
english_translation: It's exciting to bring the kids to play at the floating market, especially to the mini town... here the kids can practice professions... there's being a chef, nurse, firefighter, police officer, cake decorator, salon, etc. For chefs or professions that involve making things, the results of their work can be taken home. The kids are definitely very excited... and so are the moms 😅...
summary: This family-friendly floating market contains a "mini town" facility where children can participate in professional role-playing activities, such as being a chef, nurse, or firefighter. A key feature is that children can take home the items they create in certain professions.
